Details: Two Informatica XML mappings for MEMBERSDATA DQ implementation with significant structural and completeness differences. Basic_Mapping provides minimal source definition while Complete_DQ_Mapping delivers comprehensive DQ solution with full transformation pipeline.

Both outputs target MEMBERSDATA DQ implementation with identical field definitions (FIRSTNAME through MEMBER_ID). Complete_DQ_Mapping fully realizes the DQ intent with actual validation rules while Basic_Mapping only establishes foundation. Same business objective but vastly different implementation depth.

Fundamentally different structural approaches. Basic_Mapping uses simple MAPPING wrapper (lines 1-15) while Complete_DQ_Mapping employs full POWERMART structure with REPOSITORY/FOLDER hierarchy (lines 1-300+). Complete version includes comprehensive transformation pipeline: Source Qualifier, Expression, Aggregator, Joiner, Router, and dual targets - absent in basic version.

Valid XML syntax with proper Informatica MAPPING structure. All SOURCEFIELD definitions syntactically correct with appropriate attributes. Minor issue: incomplete mapping (no transformations/targets) but structurally sound for partial implementation.

Valid XML with comprehensive Informatica PowerMart structure. Issues: Line 45 NULLABLE='NOTNULL' should be 'NOT NULL', Line 60 missing FIELDTYPE attribute, Lines 180-200 complex expressions may have syntax issues with MATCHES_REGEX function availability, Lines 250-270 extensive CONNECTOR definitions appear valid but untested.
Average of individual correctness scores (95 + 88) / 2 = 91.5, rounded to 92. Both outputs demonstrate strong XML and Informatica syntax compliance with minor issues in the complete implementation.

Line_References: Lines 1-15: Expand minimal mapping to include actual DQ transformations, target definitions, and data flow connectors to match business requirements for comprehensive data quality implementation.

Lines 45-60: Fix NULLABLE attribute syntax, verify MATCHES_REGEX function availability in target Informatica version, and validate complex expression syntax. Lines 250-270: Test extensive connector definitions for proper field mapping alignment.
